basic_details.job_title: SVNIT Surat Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for JRF/ Project Assistant Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology Surat (SVNIT Surat)
basic_details.short_information: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology Surat (SVNIT Surat) JRF/Project Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website svnit.ac.in/. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the SVNIT Surat JRF/Project Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Chemistry or an equivalent degree in Chemistry with First Division and GATE/NET in the Chemistry or relevant subject for JRF; M.Sc. in Chemistry or an equivalent degree in Chemistry with First Division for Project Assistant
qualification.details: JRF: M.Sc. in Chemistry or an equivalent degree in Chemistry with First Division and GATE/NET in the Chemistry or relevant subject. Project Assistant: M.Sc. in Chemistry or an equivalent degree in Chemistry with First Division.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs 37,000/- + 18% HRA for JRF or Rs. 20,000/- + 18% HRA for Project Assistant
salary_details.details: JRF: Rs 37,000/- + 18% HRA Project Assistant: Rs 20,000/- + 18% HRA

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for SVNIT Surat JRF/Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 21-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: SVNIT Surat JRF/Project Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the SVNIT Surat Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download SVNIT Surat JRF/ Project Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

SVNIT Surat JRF/Project Assistant Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: JRF: M.Sc. in Chemistry or an equivalent degree in Chemistry with First Division and GATE/NET in the Chemistry or relevant subject. Project Assistant: M.Sc. in Chemistry or an equivalent degree in Chemistry with First Division.

content_sections.heading: SVNIT Surat JRF/Project Assistant Salary 2026
content_sections.text: JRF: Rs 37,000/- + 18% HRA Project Assistant: Rs 20,000/- + 18% HRA

content_sections.heading: SVNIT Surat JRF/Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
SVNIT Surat JRF/Project Assistant Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for SVNIT Surat JRF/Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 21-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: SVNIT Surat JRF/Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the SVNIT Surat JRF/Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 21st July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the JRF/Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: For JRF, an M.Sc. in Chemistry with First Division and GATE/NET is required. For Project Assistant, an M.Sc. in Chemistry with First Division is sufficient.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF and Project Assistant positions?
faq.answer: The salary for JRF is Rs 37,000/- plus 18% HRA, and for Project Assistant, it is Rs 20,000/- plus 18% HRA.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the JRF/Project Assistant roles?
faq.answer: The selection process for these positions will be based on an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for SVNIT Surat JRF/Project Assistant jobs?
faq.answer: The application needs to be submitted via email. Candidates must send their complete application along with required documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q7. Does SVNIT Surat offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any age limits or relaxation details. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for further information.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are needed to be attached with the application?
faq.answer: You need to attach self-attested copies of all required documents, including educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions of JRF/Project Assistant at SVNIT Surat are contractual in nature.
